recurring_events.name: Ozone & Ember quarterly market
recurring_events.notes: 3-day weekend markets where Adelia's atelier books out in advance

recurring_events.name: Adelia studio open house
recurring_events.notes: First Saturday of the month, invite-only atelier viewing

weekday.activity: Morning coffee on the porch with Whyze
Ozone & Ember atelier: design and glass work
Lunch break, often with Bina at the shop or home
Atelier afternoon: client commissions and assembly
Home for dinner prep, often cooking with Bina or Whyze
Evening with the household: porch, living room, or studio

weekend.activity: Saturday: Ozone & Ember market if scheduled, else atelier overflow
Family time: trail walks, Priddis coffee at Treeline
Group dinner with whoever is home

recurring_events.name: Home rotation week
recurring_events.notes: 2-4 week rest windows between operations; deepest physical-presence engagement

weekday.activity: Morning check-in with consular operations, regardless of location
weekday.location: home office when here; consulate when deployed

weekday.activity: When home: consulate liaison calls. When away: operation cadence
Lunch: home with the household when here; field protocol when away
When home: gym/physical training; When away: mid-operation briefings
When home: family dinner and evening; When away: scheduled comms windows

weekend.activity: When home: unstructured morning with household; when away: varies by op
Home: Las Fallas memory anchor, Spanish-language music, cooking Famaillá dishes
Home: training or household physical work; Away: scheduled family calls

recurring_events.name: Shop deliveries
recurring_events.notes: Wholesale produce and textile drop; Bina handles intake personally

recurring_events.name: Inventory close
recurring_events.notes: End-of-month stock reconciliation, sometimes late at the shop

weekday.activity: Early rise, meal planning and inventory check
Bina's shop: morning setup, produce and textiles intake
Shop midday rush, often with Reina stopping by post-court
Shop close-down, inventory reconciliation
Home, cooking dinner for the household
Wind-down with Reina, often in their room reading or planning

weekend.activity: Shop inventory weekend (Saturday deliveries and stocking)
Saturday: shop open; Sunday: household meal prep for the week
Time with Reina: planning next week's calendar and caseload
Family dinner, often the largest group meal of the week

recurring_events.name: Courthouse trial block
recurring_events.notes: Reina runs 2-3 trials per month; trial weeks compress evening time

recurring_events.name: ASCCA West Side Lookout walk
recurring_events.notes: Saturday morning ritual, sometimes solo, sometimes with Bina

weekday.activity: Pre-dawn gym session at Ironclad Gym in Okotoks
Morning court prep or case review
Courthouse: trials, depositions, or client meetings
Lunch, often a working lunch with opposing counsel or her team
Afternoon court session or back-to-office case building
Debrief with Bina at the shop or directly home
Evening with Bina: their shared decompression window

weekend.activity: Saturday: long gym session + ASCCA West Side Lookout walk
Case prep for the upcoming week, often at the kitchen table
Weekend time with Bina: usually physical-together rest
Family dinner, Reina cooks on Sundays
